messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0043",
  "title": "GameLook",
  "page_index": 29,
  "page_range": "29-30"
}

Section text:
GameLook
2025年的出海游戏市场，全新的大作产品并不多，但却是“滚雪球”高手们表现十分突出的一年，体现了 聚焦核心赛道、长青游戏战略的正确性 。从结果来看，
无论是 SLG策略游戏、还是休闲合并消除游戏表现格外强势，目前出海 TOP30 中国手游产品中，常年有 10款SLG游戏，而休闲内购型的手游也多达 6款。
在长期买量投入、持续推高手游产品的马拉松营销大战中，休闲 SLG以其具竞争力的买量方式、高 ROI和高留存，抢到了更多的出海市场大盘，并在 2025年诞
生了《Kingshot 》这样的休闲 SLG全球爆款。而合并和消除类型，在 2025年逐步成长为出海的巨无霸类型，已诞生单月流水收入超 10亿的世界级休闲大厂 --柠
檬微趣，而点点互动在 2025年也实现了合并休闲手游月流水破 1.5亿的佳绩。
与休闲 SLG、休闲合并游戏节节攀高形成鲜明对比的是，腾讯网易米哈游等传统大厂因为持续发力 PC和主机平台、以及三方支付，手游带来的直接收入占比处
于一个相对稳定态，大厂出海的增长点反而来自 PC主机市场，旗舰游戏的 3A化、跨平台化、全球化，成为了大厂的一致选择，无论是腾讯的 《三角洲行动 》、
还是网易的 《燕云十六声 》均实现了 PC和主机市场的海外突破。
放眼全球市场，越来越多的国内以及海外厂商开始调整发行策略，聚焦老产品或者长青游戏的经营 ，即反应了当下全球手游市场突破难度高、回本难的现实困
境，但也提出了更多的有效改善老产品新用户增长、成本结构的措施，比如三方支付的普及，混变模式对老产品的改造，以及叠加 AI能力的加持、为老游戏提
供更丰富的新内容，成为了主要的手段。
在日益重视成本结构和长期回报的当下，与国内小游戏赛道继续保持高增长形成鲜明对比的是， 2025年真正取得海外市场成功的出海 IAP内购型小游戏却并不
多、成绩并不突出，海外与国内市场反差较大的手游用户环境、平台发展状态，确实造成了国内小游戏赛道的过度拥挤，出海小游戏要取得成功已到了“万里
挑一”的严苛状况，小游戏迫切需要产品品质升级和玩法和题材的本地化。29

message.content:
This section answers questions regarding 2025 overseas Chinese game market trends, genre performance, publisher strategies, and specific financial/operational metrics.
- **Topics & Trends:** 2025 overseas market dynamics; dominance of SLG and casual merge/elimination genres; major publishers' strategic shift toward PC/console and cross-platform AAA titles; high barriers and localization needs for overseas IAP mini-games; operational focus on evergreen/long-tail games.
- **Key Entities & Dates:** 2025; Publishers: Tencent, NetEase, miHoYo, Lemon Micro Fun (柠檬微趣), DianDian Interactive (点点互动); Titles: *Kingshot*, *Delta Force* (三角洲行动), *Where Winds Meet* (燕云十六声); Source: GameLook.
- **Metrics & Evidence:** TOP30 overseas Chinese mobile games consistently include ~10 SLG and ~6 casual IAP titles. Lemon Micro Fun exceeded 1 billion RMB in monthly revenue. DianDian Interactive surpassed 150 million RMB monthly revenue for merge casual games. *Kingshot* is cited as a global casual SLG hit. *Delta Force* and *Where Winds Meet* achieved overseas PC/console market breakthroughs.
- **Strategic Claims & Procedures:** Focusing on core tracks and evergreen strategies is validated by market results. Big publishers maintain stable mobile revenue by prioritizing PC/console, third-party payments, and AAA cross-platform development. Revitalizing older products involves adopting third-party payments, implementing hybrid monetization (混变模式), and integrating AI for content updates. Overseas mini-game success requires quality upgrades and localized gameplay/themes.
- **Definitions/Concepts:** Casual SLG (休闲SLG), Evergreen/Long-tail game strategy (长青游戏战略), Hybrid monetization model (混变模式), IAP mini-games (IAP内购型小游戏).
- **Evidence Types:** Market ranking distributions, monthly revenue figures, publisher strategic pivots, genre growth analysis, and product case studies. No tables or figures are referenced in this section.

response_text:
This section answers questions regarding 2025 overseas Chinese game market trends, genre performance, publisher strategies, and specific financial/operational metrics.
- **Topics & Trends:** 2025 overseas market dynamics; dominance of SLG and casual merge/elimination genres; major publishers' strategic shift toward PC/console and cross-platform AAA titles; high barriers and localization needs for overseas IAP mini-games; operational focus on evergreen/long-tail games.
- **Key Entities & Dates:** 2025; Publishers: Tencent, NetEase, miHoYo, Lemon Micro Fun (柠檬微趣), DianDian Interactive (点点互动); Titles: *Kingshot*, *Delta Force* (三角洲行动), *Where Winds Meet* (燕云十六声); Source: GameLook.
- **Metrics & Evidence:** TOP30 overseas Chinese mobile games consistently include ~10 SLG and ~6 casual IAP titles. Lemon Micro Fun exceeded 1 billion RMB in monthly revenue. DianDian Interactive surpassed 150 million RMB monthly revenue for merge casual games. *Kingshot* is cited as a global casual SLG hit. *Delta Force* and *Where Winds Meet* achieved overseas PC/console market breakthroughs.
- **Strategic Claims & Procedures:** Focusing on core tracks and evergreen strategies is validated by market results. Big publishers maintain stable mobile revenue by prioritizing PC/console, third-party payments, and AAA cross-platform development. Revitalizing older products involves adopting third-party payments, implementing hybrid monetization (混变模式), and integrating AI for content updates. Overseas mini-game success requires quality upgrades and localized gameplay/themes.
- **Definitions/Concepts:** Casual SLG (休闲SLG), Evergreen/Long-tail game strategy (长青游戏战略), Hybrid monetization model (混变模式), IAP mini-games (IAP内购型小游戏).
- **Evidence Types:** Market ranking distributions, monthly revenue figures, publisher strategic pivots, genre growth analysis, and product case studies. No tables or figures are referenced in this section.
